section.title: Irregular Verbs
section.summary: A comprehensive alphabetical reference table of English irregular verbs, including simple past, past participle, and French translations.

questions.prompt: Choose the simple past form of the verb 'arise'.
questions.explanation: The simple past form of 'arise' is 'arose'.

questions.prompt: What is the past participle form of 'arise'?
questions.explanation: The past participle form of 'arise' is 'arisen'.

questions.prompt: Identify the infinitive verb for the simple past form 'was/were'.
questions.explanation: The infinitive verb for the simple past form 'was/were' is 'be'.

questions.prompt: What is the French translation for the verb 'bear'?
questions.explanation: The French translation for 'bear' is 'porter'.
